qa_pairs.question: What steps are required for me to renew my Alliance account?
qa_pairs.answer: To renew your Alliance account, you will receive an email during the renewal period with a link to the CCDB form. You need to update your contact information and Field of Research, complete a short User Satisfaction Survey, and for faculty, update the status of your sponsored roles. Finally, you must click the 'REQUEST ACCOUNT RENEWAL' button on the left side of the form to submit your request.

qa_pairs.question: What information do faculty members need to update during the account renewal process?
qa_pairs.answer: Faculty members need to update their contact information, Field of Research, complete a User Satisfaction Survey, and specifically update the status of their sponsored roles (e.g., students, postdocs), indicating whether they are continuing or their sponsorship has ended.

qa_pairs.question: If I am a Principal Investigator (PI) and move to a new institution, will my sponsored users automatically transfer to my new faculty role?
qa_pairs.answer: No, if you are a PI moving to a different institution, users sponsored with your old role will not be automatically transferred to your new faculty role. Each user you wish to sponsor under your new role will need to apply for a new role sponsored by your new faculty position.

qa_pairs.question: What happens to a sponsored user's access to a Resource Allocation Project (RAP) if their PI moves institutions and they get a new role?
qa_pairs.answer: If a PI moves institutions and gets a new faculty role, users sponsored with their old role will lose access to the Resource Allocation Project (RAP). Once these sponsored users have their new roles activated, the PI may need to re-add them to the RAP by going to 'My Projects' -> 'Manage Project Membership'.

qa_pairs.question: Can I access the files of a sponsored user if I indicated in my renewal form that they have moved on and are no longer under my sponsorship?
qa_pairs.answer: Accessing the files of a sponsored user who has moved on may require their consent. It is important to make arrangements with the former sponsored user as soon as possible to mitigate the risk of them becoming incommunicado. More information can be found on the Alliance's 'Access to files of users leaving a project' page.

qa_pairs.question: What should a sponsor do to prepare for accessing files of a former sponsored user?
qa_pairs.answer: A sponsor should make arrangements with their sponsored user as soon as possible, ideally before they become a former sponsored user, to ensure consent for accessing files. Consulting the 'Access to files of users leaving a project' page is also recommended for more details.

qa_pairs.question: How do users with a sponsored role, such as Doctoral or Masters, renew their account?
qa_pairs.answer: Users with a sponsored role will receive an email during the account renewal period with a link to the account renewal form. They must update their contact information, complete the form, fill out a short User Satisfaction Survey, and then click the 'REQUEST ACCOUNT RENEWAL' button to initiate the request.

qa_pairs.question: What happens if my sponsor indicates that I, as a sponsored user, have moved on or changed positions?
qa_pairs.answer: If your sponsor indicates that you have moved on, graduated, or changed positions, you will not be able to renew that specific role. Instead, you must apply for a new role that accurately reflects your current circumstances, such as a new sponsor, institution, or position.

qa_pairs.question: Why is my sponsored role still deactivated even after I completed the renewal process on CCDB?
qa_pairs.answer: Your sponsored role may still be deactivated because your sponsor has not yet renewed or reactivated their own account. Your role will typically be activated as soon as your sponsor renews their account and confirms your role.

qa_pairs.question: Who should I contact if I have questions or need help regarding a deactivated sponsored role?
qa_pairs.answer: If you have questions or need help regarding a deactivated sponsored role, you should send an email to renewals@tech.alliancecan.ca.

qa_pairs.question: What is required for a sponsored account to be activated?
qa_pairs.answer: A sponsored account will only be activated once the sponsor confirms that the role is continuing AND the sponsor renews their own account.

qa_pairs.question: What should I do if I made a mistake and renewed my account with the wrong role?
qa_pairs.answer: If you renewed your account with the wrong role, you should create a new role with your current information. Log into CCDB, go to 'My Account' -> 'Apply for a new role' in the main menu, and follow the instructions to select your new role. Your sponsor will then receive an email to confirm this new role.

qa_pairs.question: How can I apply for a new role on CCDB?
qa_pairs.answer: To apply for a new role on CCDB, log in and navigate to the main menu. Under 'My Account', select 'Apply for a new role'. Follow the instructions to choose and submit your new role.

qa_pairs.question: When will my old role be deactivated if I create a new role to correct a mistake?
qa_pairs.answer: If you create a new role and do not renew your old one, your old role will automatically expire and be deactivated on the morning of June 11, 2025.
